2026-04-13T09:15:51.6313425Z You are in 'detached HEAD' state. You can look around, make experimental
2026-04-13T09:15:51.6344070Z changes and commit them, and you can discard any commits you make in this
2026-04-13T09:15:51.6346369Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.
2026-04-13T09:15:51.6347060Z 
2026-04-13T09:15:51.6347477Z If you want to create a new branch to retain commits you create, you may
2026-04-13T09:15:51.6349638Z do so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:
2026-04-13T09:15:51.6350274Z 
2026-04-13T09:15:51.6350545Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-04-13T09:15:51.6350956Z 
2026-04-13T09:15:51.6351311Z Or undo this operation with:
2026-04-13T09:15:51.6352401Z 
2026-04-13T09:15:51.6352634Z   git switch -
2026-04-13T09:15:51.6352896Z
